sql_array: CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP(3) WITH TIME ZONE);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMP '2023-10-01 10:30:00.123+02:00');
UPDATE events SET event_time = TIMESTAMP '2023-10-02 12:45:00.456-05:00' WHERE event_id = 1;
SELECT event_id, event_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' FROM events;
SELECT event_id, event_time + INTERVAL '1 hour' FROM events;
